title: 异步作业轮询范式
output:
DefineSystem rv=0 mode=Sync jobState=7
ModifyResourceSettings rv=0 mode=Sync jobState=7 errCode=0
Readback VirtualQuantity=2
ASSERT PASS: async/sync job pattern handled; both ops terminal-good; readback=2
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096 mode=Async jobState=7
CLEANUP verified: no WMITEST_job_pattern remains
notes: 返回码语义: rv=0 表示同步完成,不返回 Job 对象; rv=4096 表示异步,OUT 参数 Job 给出 Msvm_ConcreteJob 路径,需轮询; 其它值为同步失败的错误码。
同一脚本可能同时遇到同步与异步两条路径: 例如 DefineSystem 与 ModifyResourceSettings 常同步返回 rv=0,而 DestroySystem 常返回 4096 并生成 ConcreteJob。通用等待器应同时处理这两种情形。
JobState 为 DMTF CIM_ConcreteJob 标准枚举: 3=Starting 与 4=Running 表示进行中需继续轮询; 终止态中 7=Completed 表示成功, 8/9/10 分别为 Terminated/Killed/Exception 表示失败。
嵌入实例统一用 GetText(1) 序列化后传入方法; 轮询时用 [wmi]$jobPath 每次重新取实例以刷新 JobState; 失败时读取 ErrorCode/ErrorDescription 进行诊断。
更健壮的成功判定应同时接受 32768(CompletedWithWarnings)。轮询条件可写为 while($j.JobState -lt 7 -and $j.JobState -ne 32768){...},成功判定为 ($j.JobState -eq 7 -or $j.JobState -eq 32768),以覆盖 New/Suspended/ShuttingDown 等中间态。
notes_en: Return code semantics: rv=0 indicates synchronous completion and returns no Job object; rv=4096 indicates an asynchronous operation, with the OUT parameter Job providing the Msvm_ConcreteJob path to be polled; any other value is an error code for a synchronous failure.

A single script may encounter both the synchronous and asynchronous paths: for example, DefineSystem and ModifyResourceSettings commonly return rv=0 synchronously, while DestroySystem commonly returns 4096 and produces a ConcreteJob. A general-purpose waiter should handle both cases.

JobState is the DMTF CIM_ConcreteJob standard enumeration: 3=Starting and 4=Running indicate in progress and require continued polling; among the terminal states, 7=Completed indicates success, and 8/9/10 (Terminated/Killed/Exception) indicate failure.

Embedded instances are uniformly serialized with GetText(1) before being passed to a method; when polling, use [wmi]$jobPath to re-fetch the instance each time to refresh JobState; on failure, read ErrorCode/ErrorDescription for diagnosis.

A more robust success determination should also accept 32768 (CompletedWithWarnings). The polling condition can be written as while($j.JobState -lt 7 -and $j.JobState -ne 32768){...}, with the success determination being ($j.JobState -eq 7 -or $j.JobState -eq 32768), so as to cover intermediate states such as New/Suspended/ShuttingDown.
